visualization.requirement: Aggregated line charts segmented by week/month with campaign event overlays using distinct markers.
visualization.reason: Original calendar heatmap would be unreadable with 600+ daily data points. Weekly/monthly aggregation better supports pattern recognition while maintaining event correlation.

visualization.requirement: Single multi-line chart with hourly x-axis and categorical color encoding instead of small multiples.
visualization.reason: 11 product categories (from blinkit_products.category stats) would create excessive small multiples. Line super-positioning with color legend better preserves comparison capability.

visualization.requirement: Remove scatter plot matrix - conflicts with core time-series focus. Replace with seasonal decomposition line charts showing trend/residual components.
visualization.reason: Original design introduces unrelated entity relationships. Time series decomposition directly supports trend isolation from cyclical patterns per analysis goal.

interaction.requirement: Replace click-based cross-filtering with dynamic query sliders for category percentage thresholds.
interaction.reason: With 11 categories, bar click selection would be error-prone. Continuous filtering better supports gradual exploration of category dominance patterns.
